args.query: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON replace(oi.OrderId,'#','') = replace(o.Id,'#','') JOIN Product2 p ON replace(p.Id,'#','') = replace(oi.Product2Id,'#','') WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON replace(oi.OrderId,'#','') = replace(o.Id,'#','') JOIN Product2 p ON replace(p.Id,'#','') = replace(oi.Product2Id,'#','') WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CreatedDate, CloseDate, StageName FROM Opportunity WHERE replace(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01' ORDER BY CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CreatedDate, CloseDate, StageName FROM Opportunity WHERE replace(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01' ORDER BY CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) DESC;

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
ops = pd.DataFrame(var_call_pdkek3fDo4gGeLup54sukjCC)
orders = pd.DataFrame(var_call_gjzfXWq9eKFMwSqs1DKuW2bi)
acct_ids = set(ops['AccountId'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False).tolist())
orders['AccountId_clean'] = orders['AccountId'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False)
orders_f = orders[orders['AccountId_clean'].isin(acct_ids)].copy()
# choose AI processing unit by name contains 'AI' (case-insensitive)
orders_f['is_ai'] = orders_f['ProductName'].astype(str).str.contains('AI', case=False, na=False)
ai = orders_f[orders_f['is_ai']].copy()
prod_id = None
if len(ai)>0:
    prod_id = ai.iloc[0]['Product2Id']
    if isinstance(prod_id, str):
        prod_id = prod_id.replace('#','')
res = prod_id if prod_id is not None else ''
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))

import json, pandas as pd
ops = pd.DataFrame(var_call_pdkek3fDo4gGeLup54sukjCC)
orders = pd.DataFrame(var_call_gjzfXWq9eKFMwSqs1DKuW2bi)
acct_ids = set(ops['AccountId'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False).tolist())
orders['AccountId_clean'] = orders['AccountId'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False)
orders_f = orders[orders['AccountId_clean'].isin(acct_ids)].copy()
# choose AI processing unit by name contains 'AI' (case-insensitive)
orders_f['is_ai'] = orders_f['ProductName'].astype(str).str.contains('AI', case=False, na=False)
ai = orders_f[orders_f['is_ai']].copy()
prod_id = None
if len(ai)>0:
    prod_id = ai.iloc[0]['Product2Id']
    if isinstance(prod_id, str):
        prod_id = prod_id.replace('#','')
res = prod_id if prod_id is not None else ''
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))
